title: Command Cockpit Control Matrix Quick Deck
summary: Compressed the selected-lane control matrix into a quick game-controller deck inside the Command Cockpit so more mounted-stage content stays visible.
proof: Scoped the quick deck to Command Cockpit only, preserving the richer full control matrix elsewhere.
Collapsed Latest, Gate, and Next into three compact chronicle chips without adding a new scroll section.
Kept view portals visible as a compact command row and paired the view runner with quick lane switching on the bottom row.
Updated README, index marker, snapshot generation, regression floors, and trace metadata so the standalone atlas records the quick-deck unlock.
